evidence: Implemented Phase 1 freshness core on top of SQLite persistence: filesystem freshness snapshots compare indexed hashes with current scan state; stale/deleted cache hits and stale topology edges are filtered before ContextPack; ContextPack reports staleFiles, pendingFiles, skippedFiles, and missingEvidence; regression tests cover changed, deleted, new pending, ignored sensitive files plus SQLite persistence/project isolation. Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build.

Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build. Completion audit: SQLiteGraphStore persists project-scoped graph rows and skipped metadata; upsert performs transactional per-file stale row deletion before insert; engine computes filesystem freshness snapshots, filters stale/deleted cache hits and stale topology edges, and ContextPack reports staleFiles, pendingFiles, skippedFiles, and missingEvidence. Tests cover SQLite persistence/replacement/project isolation plus changed/deleted/new/ignored freshness behavior.
